title: ononis biflora subsp. maroccana
intro: Ononis biflora subsp. maroccana, also known as the Maroccan sweet pea, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the legume family. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ononis biflora subsp. maroccana include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
